meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Policy Preview
meta.description: Here is quick read ahead of what you can expect to see at this year's Policy @ DEF CON event. Harley Geiger takes us through what to expect and how “ AI will quantum all of your blockchains.” Come and hang out after the days events on Friday and Saturday night for our policy mixer event starting at 6:30pm in Room 237!
